metadata.description: House of Vibe — Claude Code tools for vibe coders.

plugins.name: token-eater
plugins.description: Spend your about-to-expire AI credits on safe, reviewed code cleanup. Just run /token-eater: it tidies your code in an isolated copy, verifies it, reviews it, and opens a draft PR. Never merges.

plugins.name: pro-gate
plugins.description: Get the deepest final code review from ChatGPT's most powerful model (GPT-5.5 Pro) before you merge. Just run /pro-gate: it reviews your pull request, fixes what it safely can, and comments — never merges. One-time guided setup. Requires a ChatGPT Pro plan.
